privileged_info_summary: The task requires researching three books in the Library of Congress Online Catalog. Two of the three LCCN values have been verified as correct: Design of Everyday Things has LCCN 2013024417 and Thinking, Fast and Slow has LCCN 2011027143. However, the metadata claims Silent Spring (ISBN 9780618249060) has LCCN 2002073994, but the correct LCCN for the 2002 Houghton Mifflin anniversary edition is 2002726803. All three ISBNs are correct, and the call number patterns (after regex expansion) correspond to valid Library of Congress classifications, though Silent Spring has multiple valid call numbers in use across different libraries (QH545.P4 C38 2002 and SB959.C3 are both used).
